title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a secure wireless survey and deployment plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare relevant 802.11 capabilities across 2.4, 5, and 6 GHz bands, channel availability, range, and client support.
Choose channel, width, reuse, and band steering from regulatory domain, overlap, contention, capacity, and coverage.
Distinguish SSID, BSSID, ESS, hidden names, and client discovery without treating an SSID as a security control.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

stimulus.title: Net Wireless Survey Roaming case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: network wireless. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Strong RSSI alone proves a wireless cell has sufficient capacity and quality.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Perform predictive and measured surveys and verify RSSI, SNR, interference, utilization, roaming, and application outcomes. Artifact under review: a complete first version of a secure wireless survey and deployment plan while every earlier competency remains active.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Net Wireless Survey Roaming, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Net Wireless Survey Roaming applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Perform predictive and measured surveys and verify RSSI, SNR, interference, utilization, roaming, and application outcomes.
